flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Adventist University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.2k → $27.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southern Adventist University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.2k → $27.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Adventist University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southern Adventist University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (2.3k → 2.8k).
